results.title: SpaceX IPO makes Elon Musk the world’s first trillionaire By Reuters - Investing.com
results.description: SpaceX IPO makes Elon Musk the world’s first trillionaire By Reuters Investing.com SpaceX IPO Draws More Than $100 Billion in Retail Orders Bloomberg.com SpaceX to list on US stock market today after raising $75bn in largest IPO ever – business live The Guardian SpaceX to make historic IPO that could make Musk a trillionaire The Hindu World's first trillionaire Elon Musk is now richer than Taiwan after SpaceX IPO India Today
